properties.name: ticker.server.enabled
properties.description: Activate the Ticker collector (REST API + bundled UI + poller).

properties.name: ticker.server.base-path
properties.description: Optional prefix to relocate the whole UI + API under, e.g. `/ticker` (UI at /ticker/, API at /ticker/api/**) for when a bare /api clashes behind a shared gateway. The collector's own /actuator stays put so external liveness probes keep a stable path.

properties.name: ticker.server.registration-expiry
properties.description: Opt-in: evict a self-registered instance whose heartbeat stopped for this long (e.g. 10m). 0 (default) = never — a crashed instance should stay red on the wall; graceful shutdowns deregister themselves.

properties.name: ticker.server.exclude-self-requests
properties.description: Drop the collector's own monitoring traffic (/actuator self-poll + its /api UI polling, base-path aware) from its http.server.requests metric, so the 'self' tile shows real traffic. Default on.

properties.name: ticker.poll.interval
properties.description: How often every target is polled (virtual-thread fan-out).

properties.name: ticker.poll.failure-threshold
properties.description: Consecutive failed polls before a target flips DOWN (debounce — never alert on a single blip).

properties.name: ticker.alert.enabled
properties.description: Enable alerting (incident DOWN/recovery + per-metric thresholds). Without a webhook, alerts are inert and logged once.

properties.name: ticker.alert.slack-webhook-url
properties.description: Slack incoming-webhook URL — a credential: reference it from the environment (`${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL:}` or the TICKER_ALERT_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env var), never commit the value. Blank counts as unset (alerts stay log-inert).

properties.name: ticker.alert.cooldown
properties.description: Minimum gap before re-alerting the same incident (suppresses flapping).

properties.name: ticker.alert.metric-interval
properties.description: How often metric-threshold rules are evaluated against live SPRING targets.

properties.name: ticker.server.public-url
properties.description: The externally-reachable URL people use to open this Ticker in a browser (scheme + host + port + path, e.g. https://ops.acme.com/ticker). Ticker can't discover this itself; used wherever it points humans back at itself, e.g. the 'Open Ticker board' link in Slack alerts. Optional — unset simply omits links. (Same idea as Grafana's root_url.)

properties.name: ticker.history.enabled
properties.description: Enable opt-in persisted metric history (off by default; fully in-memory when false).

properties.name: ticker.history.db
properties.description: Which database backs history. H2 = embedded file (default, zero-setup). MYSQL / POSTGRESQL need `url` + credentials.

properties.name: ticker.history.sample-interval
properties.description: How often the recorder samples whitelisted metrics.

properties.name: ticker.history.retention
properties.description: How long samples are kept before the hourly prune deletes them.

properties.name: ticker.history.h2-path
properties.description: H2 file path (db=H2 only). A durable path/volume in production — not /tmp.

properties.name: ticker.history.url
properties.description: JDBC URL. Required when db=MYSQL or POSTGRESQL (e.g. jdbc:mysql://host:3306/ticker). Ignored for H2 unless set.

properties.name: ticker.history.username
properties.description: DB username — supply via env, never commit (guardrail #5).

properties.name: ticker.history.password
properties.description: DB password — supply via env, never commit (guardrail #5).

properties.name: ticker.history.init-schema
properties.description: Auto-create the schema at startup (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS). Set false if a DBA pre-provisions the table on a restricted account.

properties.name: ticker.history.max-buckets
properties.description: Max downsample buckets returned by a range query.

properties.name: ticker.history.archive.enabled
properties.description: Archive rows to cold storage BEFORE the retention prune deletes them (guardrail #5). When true, prune only runs after a successful write+verify.

properties.name: ticker.history.archive.dir
properties.description: Directory for archive files (gzip CSV, one per prune batch). Use a durable path/volume in production.

properties.name: ticker.history.archive.file-retention
properties.description: Rolling cap (Logback-style): delete archive files older than this.

properties.name: ticker.history.archive.max-total-size-mb
properties.description: Rolling cap (Logback totalSizeCap): keep the archive dir under this many MB, deleting oldest first. 0 = unlimited.

values.description: Embedded H2 file — zero setup, good default.
MySQL — set ticker.history.url + credentials (env); add the MySQL driver dependency.
PostgreSQL — set ticker.history.url + credentials (env); add the PostgreSQL driver dependency.
